text.content: Executive Summary

rich_text.plain_text: Executive Summary

text.content: Developed complete YOUniverse MVP1 with galaxy UI, entity management, and Tana sync layer. Implemented 24 tiny planet visual system mapped to 7 chakras for orbital representation. Created comprehensive import hub supporting Tana JSON, Notion CSV, and markdown formats. Built personal dataset with 158 real entities from user's ecosystem including projects, relationships, tools, and health data.

markdown_content:
## Executive Summary

Developed complete YOUniverse MVP1 with galaxy UI, entity management, and Tana sync layer. Implemented 24 tiny planet visual system mapped to 7 chakras for orbital representation. Created comprehensive import hub supporting Tana JSON, Notion CSV, and markdown formats. Built personal dataset with 158 real entities from user's ecosystem including projects, relationships, tools, and health data.


## Context & Intent

Create a functional personal universe visualization platform that integrates with Tana as the primary source of truth, allowing users to navigate and understand their personal ecosystem through an interactive galaxy interface with cognitive capabilities.


## What Was Done

Built complete MVP1 with galaxy UI, entity/relation models, import/export systems, Tana sync layer, youOS cognition integration, and visual tiny planet system. Compiled and imported 158 real user entities across 7 domains mapped to chakras. Implemented read-only architecture with Tana as single source of truth.


## Outputs Produced

- [application] YOUniverse MVP1 — Complete galaxy visualization platform with entity management
- [system] Tana Sync Layer — Bidirectional sync system with JSON parsing and diff engine
- [ui] Tiny Planet Galaxy — 24 planet images mapped to 7 chakras with orbital visualization
- [dataset] Personal Entity Database — 158 real user entities across all life domains
- [system] Import Hub — Unified importer for Tana, Notion, CSV, and markdown formats

## Key Decisions & Validations

- SVG native over 3D libraries for performance and control
- Read-only galaxy UI with Tana as single source of truth
- Unidirectional sync from Tana to avoid data conflicts
- Chakra-based orbital mapping for 7 life domains
- Personal data compilation from mem0 and conversation history

## Lessons Learned

Worked well:

- SVG-based galaxy renders perfectly with 158 entities
- Chakra mapping provides intuitive domain organization
- Read-only architecture eliminates sync complexity
- Real personal data makes the system immediately valuable
Failed / suboptimal:

- Initial Tana API token was personal instead of workspace token
- Some imported tools in Resources domain are rarely used and need cleanup
Discoveries:

- Tiny planet visuals create more engaging user experience than abstract nodes
- Staleness detection with visual dimming effectively highlights outdated data
- youOS cognition with real personal context changes everything

## Challenges & Blockers

- Tana Input API requires workspace-specific token, not personal token
- Resource domain over-populated with 53 tools, needs cleanup
- Need to consider privacy flags for sensitive personal data

## Open Questions

- Should orbital rotation animation be added for 'living universe' effect?
- How to handle private vs public entity visibility if system is shared?
- Which tiny planet assignments need adjustment based on user preference?

## Next Steps

- Generate proper Tana workspace token for push functionality
- Clean up Resources domain by removing rarely-used tools
- Test youOS cognition with questions about critical projects and stale data
- Add relation overlay visualization with SVG lines between connected entities
- Implement focus mode to isolate individual domain orbits
---
UID: qVq4T1ktzgp8AGvB4csEvM | Model: claude-sonnet-4-20250514 | Cost: $0.0352
